title: Luffy Escapes Into the Streets
description: On pages 16–18, this part focuses on luffy escapes into the streets, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Luffy Escapes Into the Streets. Luffy runs into both Marines and his brother Ace in Nanohana, turning the Alabasta arrival into a chaotic reunion. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Sounds like there's some- thing going on in town...

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Look! There's the rest of his crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The rest of you stand back down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You might be smoke, but I'm fire.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A match between our abilities won't get us anywhere.
